positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u16,axiom,
    steinhauer != descampe).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define winner(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define on_leaderboard(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define participated(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define from_country(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for neg.tptp
1. winner(steinhauer,du_maurier_1992) [input(axiom)]
7. winner(steinhauer,du_maurier_1992) [input(conjecture)]
8. ~winner(steinhauer,du_maurier_1992) [negated conjecture 7]
9. ~winner(steinhauer,du_maurier_1992) [flattening 8]
14. winner(steinhauer,du_maurier_1992) [cnf transformation 1]
16. ~winner(steinhauer,du_maurier_1992) [cnf transformation 9]
17. $false [forward subsumption resolution 14,16]
% SZS output end Proof for neg.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
